rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Chester C. Lehmann, Co. Inc.'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Nos. 1-5, 9, 13-16 And 20, And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, MARCH 30, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2. Defendant Chester C. Lehman Co., Inc. dba Electrical Distributors Co.¿s motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents nos. 1-5, 9, 13-16 and 20 is granted. If , as appears to be the case, plaintiffs do not have any responsive documents, they should so state in verified responses. Defendant is awarded sanctions in the amount of $1690 (6 hours at $275 per hour plus costs of $40). Plaintiffs¿ refusal to provide further verified responses lacks substantial justification. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS HRUSKA et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Monetary, Terminating And Contempt Sanctions Or Alternatively Issue And Evidentiary Sanctions For Plaintiffs¿ Failure To Obey February 4, 2011 Court Order
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, MARCH 30, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Defendant Dana Companies, LLC¿s motion for monetary, terminating and contempt sanctions or alternatively issue and evidentiary sanctions for plaintiff¿s failure to obey February 4 court order is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)
